component.name: LKM – Linux Kernel Manager
component.summary: Install, remove, and build Linux kernels

description.p: LKM is a distro-agnostic Linux kernel manager that combines runtime kernel management with a full kernel build pipeline.

ul.li: Install kernels from Mainline PPA, XanMod, Liquorix, or your distro
Build custom kernels from curated profiles (gaming, server, hardened, embedded)
Supports apt, pacman, dnf, zypper, apk, portage, xbps, and NixOS
Qt6 GUI with live build log and kernel table
